Hero.title: Cultivating transparency, harvesting trust.
Hero.subtitle: The blockchain platform securing the governance of agricultural cooperatives in Togo and opening the doors to financing.

Problem.title: Why is CoopLedger a necessity?
Problem.description: The lack of transparency is not just an administrative problem, it is a brake on rural development.

opacity.title: Opacity
opacity.text: 60%+ of Togolese cooperatives manage their accounting solely on paper/cash.

risk.title: Risk
risk.text: 15 to 20% of collective funds are embezzled every year.

trust.title: Mistrust
trust.text: 70% of members cite lack of transparency as the primary reason for mistrust.

exclusion.title: Exclusion
exclusion.text: Only 0.2% of bank loans are granted to the agricultural sector.

Solution.title: The Trust Machine
Solution.description: We use blockchain technology to transform mistrust into certainty.

ledger.title: Immutable Ledger
ledger.text: Every transaction is etched into the blockchain, making any falsification impossible.

democracy.title: Digital Democracy
democracy.text: Members vote on expenses via secure Smart Contracts.

visibility.title: Real-time Visibility
visibility.text: A dashboard accessible to all members to track the financial health of their cooperative.

Impact.title: Social Impact
Impact.description: More than a technical tool, a growth lever for farmers.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.text: Increased farmer incomes by 30 to 50% through sound management and collective buying.

funding.title: Funding
funding.text: Transparent cooperatives raise an average of 3 times more external funds (Banks, IFAD).

Footer.slogan: For a prosperous and transparent Togolese agriculture.
